figures.caption: Figure 2: Scatter plots of METABRIC responses versus (i) the supervised Stein-Encoder genetic score t = γ̂⊤Z and (ii) the first principal component of Z.
Table 2: 5-Fold Cross-Validation Results on METABRIC. The proposed Stein-Encoder consistently achieves lower MSE and higher R2 compared to unsupervised and black-box baselines.
Table 3: Top 20 genes selected by the Stein-Encoder for each prognostic response and top 20 genes by PCA

Table 1: Simulation results for all models. Each entry is averaged over 100 replications with ntrain = ntest = 2000. Angle and projection loss summarize the accuracy of the estimated index direction γ̂. MSE and R2 are computed on the test set.
